content:
🔥 polyterm | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide users with advanced, real-time analytics and monitoring capabilities for Polymarket prediction markets directly within their terminal environment.
✨ Key Features: • Terminal-based monitoring and analytics for Polymarket • 20+ advanced analytics features (whale tracking, insider detection, arbitrage scanning, signal-based predictions, wash trade detection, UMA dispute risk analysis, market risk grading)
📖 Summary: PolyTerm is a powerful, terminal-based monitoring and analytics tool for Polymarket prediction markets. It provides advanced features for tracking market shifts, whale activity, insider patterns, arbitrage opportunities, and signal-based predictions directly from the command line.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
